description_long: This is a heavily crushed and discarded Coca-Cola can, featuring a predominantly red and gold exterior with visible branding and nutritional information. The can is significantly deformed, with deep dents and creases running along its body, indicating it has been compressed, likely by foot or vehicle. The top of the can is partially visible, showing the typical aluminum pull tab opening, though the tab itself is not clearly present. The surface is glossy but marred by scratches, dirt, and signs of wear, especially around the edges and creased areas. The label is partially legible, with the iconic Coca-Cola script and some nutritional icons still visible. The can's overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to the elements and handled roughly, making it a common piece of street litter.
description: A crushed, red-and-gold Coca-Cola can with visible branding, deep dents, and signs of wear. The surface is glossy but scratched, and the can is clearly discarded and damaged.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the Coca-Cola logo and nutritional information, with pronounced dents and a flattened body.
description_view_1: The bottom view shows the can's base, which is deeply indented and partially collapsed, with some label text visible around the rim.
description_view_2: This side view displays the gold section of the can, more nutritional icons, and extensive creasing along the length.
description_view_3: The top view reveals the can's opening with the pull tab area, showing significant deformation and two large holes where the tab would be.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo on a red background, partially visible and distorted by dents.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Extensive dents, creases, and surface scratches throughout the can; no visible rust.
